requirement_topic.en: SEC Mandatory Product Approval (Sello SEC) — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: SEC强制产品认证（SEC印章）——空调器与热泵
requirement_topic.zht: SEC強制產品認證（SEC印章）——空調器與熱泵

summary.en: Chile's Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC) requires electrical appliances listed in its mandatory product scope — including air conditioners and heat pumps — to obtain the Sello SEC stamp before import and sale. The process requires: (1) manufacturer registration with SEC; (2) appointment of an in-country responsible representative (representante legal); (3) product testing or technical documentation demonstrating conformance to the applicable NCh standard (NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 for heat pumps); and (4) SEC stamp affixed to each unit. Products may not be offered for sale, imported for commercial purposes, or installed without a valid SEC authorisation.
summary.zh: 智利超电气和燃料局（SEC）要求其强制产品范围内的电气产品（包括空调器和热泵）在进口和销售前取得SEC印章认证。流程包括：（1）在SEC进行制造商注册；（2）指定国内责任代表（representante legal）；（3）提交符合适用NCh标准（热泵适用NCh/IEC 60335-2-40）的产品测试或技术文件；（4）在每台设备上贴附SEC印章。未取得有效SEC授权的产品不得销售、商业进口或安装。
summary.zht: 智利超電氣和燃料局（SEC）要求其強制產品範圍內的電氣產品（包括空調器和熱泵）在進口和銷售前取得SEC印章認證。流程包括：（1）在SEC進行製造商註冊；（2）指定國內責任代表（representante legal）；（3）提交符合適用NCh標準（熱泵適用NCh/IEC 60335-2-40）的產品測試或技術文件；（4）在每台設備上貼附SEC印章。未取得有效SEC授權的產品不得銷售、商業進口或安裝。

standards_or_laws: Reglamento de Instalaciones Domiciliarias Eléctricas y de Alumbrado Público (RIDIAP)
NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers
SEC mandatory product list (artefactos eléctricos de uso doméstico y similar)

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) regime covers household and similar electrical appliances, using GB 4706.32 (safety for household air conditioners) and related GB standards including GB 25454 for multi-split systems and GB/T 7725 for testing. CCC certificates and Chinese factory audit records constitute domestic-market compliance evidence. Chile's SEC does not recognise CCC certificates as a substitute for SEC mandatory approval; separate testing and registration are required.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制性产品认证）制度覆盖家用和类似用途电器，采用GB 4706.32（家用空调器安全标准）及相关GB标准，包括适用于多联机的GB 25454和测试方法GB/T 7725。CCC证书和中国工厂审核记录属于中国国内市场合规证据。智利SEC不将CCC证书视为SEC强制认证的替代物；须另行进行测试和注册。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制性產品認證）制度覆蓋家用和類似用途電器，採用GB 4706.32（家用空調器安全標準）及相關GB標準，包括適用於多聯機的GB 25454和測試方法GB/T 7725。CCC證書和中國工廠審核記錄屬於中國國內市場合規證據。智利SEC不將CCC證書視為SEC強制認證的替代物；須另行進行測試和註冊。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: particular requirements for air conditioners

gap.en: CCC is not recognised by SEC Chile. Chinese exporters must: (1) register the manufacturer with SEC Chile; (2) appoint a Chilean in-country legal representative; (3) obtain product testing or technical documentation to NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 by an SEC-accepted laboratory; and (4) ensure each unit bears the Sello SEC before import. Voltage and frequency (220 V 50 Hz) are identical between China and Chile, eliminating the grid-adaptation gap present in other markets.
gap.zh: SEC智利不认可CCC认证。中国出口商须：（1）在SEC智利进行制造商注册；（2）在智利当地指定法律责任代表；（3）通过SEC认可实验室获得符合NCh/IEC 60335-2-40的产品测试或技术文件；（4）确保每台设备在进口前贴附SEC印章。中国与智利的电压和频率（220 V 50 Hz）完全相同，不存在其他市场中常见的电网适配差距。
gap.zht: SEC智利不認可CCC認證。中國出口商須：（1）在SEC智利進行製造商註冊；（2）在智利當地指定法律責任代表；（3）通過SEC認可實驗室獲得符合NCh/IEC 60335-2-40的產品測試或技術文件；（4）確保每台設備在進口前貼附SEC印章。中國與智利的電壓和頻率（220 V 50 Hz）完全相同，不存在其他市場中常見的電網適配差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Sello SEC required before import and sale of listed electrical appliances in Chile
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under CCC for domestic market in China; CCC not accepted by SEC Chile

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — SEC Sello mandatory before import; CCC not recognised; manufacturer registration and in-country representative required; testing to NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——进口前须取得SEC印章认证；CCC不被认可；须进行制造商注册并指定国内责任代表；须完成NCh/IEC 60335-2-40测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——進口前須取得SEC印章認證；CCC不被認可；須進行製造商註冊並指定國內責任代表；須完成NCh/IEC 60335-2-40測試。
